summary: Initialized all four craft tracking artifacts from plotting phase documents. Foreshadowing ledger: 18 entries planted spanning conspiracy threads, romance obstacles, and world-mythology reveals. Mystery box inventory: 15 boxes with chapter-by-chapter snapshot tracking, peak of 12 active during Act II complexity. Emotional throughline: 22-chapter progression for both leads (CHAR-001 Kaelith, CHAR-002 Lirien) with no INV-037 violations, peak intensity at chapters 11, 16, 20, 21. Symbolic motif registry: 5 motifs linked to thematic pillars with target density and evolution patterns. Information asymmetry map: 12 tracked facts with 5 dramatic irony points, central irony (kill contract known to reader ch1, revealed to Kaelith ch16) sustained for 15 chapters.

motifs: MOT-001: Pallor as flayed divine skin / membrane (TP-1)
